case_title: MORAN, AMY et al VS LARSEN, JEFF

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LARSEN, JEFF
DEBTOS'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED FOR APPROVAL.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,117.55 FILED BY MORAN, AMY MESSER, SANDRA O'SHANGHNESSY, JOHN BONFIGLI, MARC AS TO DEFENDANT LARSEN, JEFF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORAN, AMY MESSER, SANDRA O'SHANGHNESSY, JOHN BONFIGLI, MARC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARSEN, JEFF $1,879.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,894.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGEMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT: DENIED W/O PREJUDICE. SEE FILE FOR REASON.
